analysis.executive_summary: Audit crawled 9,936 pages from QuickNode documentation (98.37% coverage of 10,166 discovered pages). Identified 25 confirmed broken internal documentation links with 28 additional unverified links blocked by auth/rate-limits. API reference coverage stands at 60.0% across 2,488 detected API pages. Code example reliability estimated at 42.56% and only 29.29% of pages display freshness metadata. Overall audit confidence is 70.12%, with link verification confidence notably lower at 42.17%.
strengths: Comprehensive crawl achieved 98.37% coverage with 9,936 pages successfully indexed
2,488 API pages detected and catalogued across multi-project topology
High API detection confidence at 85.0% with no detection gaps flagged
Crawl confidence strong at 94.02% indicating reliable site mapping
Zero repository navigation broken links (all 25 broken links are user-facing documentation)
risks: 25 confirmed broken internal documentation links directly impact user navigation and trust
28 unverified links (auth/rate-limit blocked) represent unknown documentation quality exposure
SEO/GEO issue rate of 26.39% significantly harms discoverability and search ranking
API reference coverage at 60.0% leaves 40% of API surface undocumented or poorly linked
Example reliability at 42.56% means majority of code samples may be outdated or non-functional
Freshness metadata visible on only 29.29% of pages obscures content currency for users
Link verification confidence of 42.17% indicates substantial uncertainty in link health assessment

prioritized_actions.action: Fix all 25 confirmed broken internal documentation links and investigate 28 unverified URLs
Implement automated example testing pipeline to improve 42.56% reliability baseline
Add last-updated timestamps to 70.71% of pages currently missing freshness metadata
Close 40% API documentation gap by auditing 2,488 detected API pages against product surface
Remediate SEO/GEO issues affecting 26.39% of pages (meta descriptions, titles, structured data)

limitations: 28 links could not be verified due to authentication, rate-limiting, or server blocks; actual broken link count may be higher
Example reliability is estimated through static analysis; actual runtime functionality requires live execution testing
API coverage percentage assumes detected API pages represent complete product surface; undiscovered APIs not measured
Crawl trapped/skipped 6,019 URLs which may contain additional documentation quality issues outside audit scope
Content accuracy, technical correctness, and user comprehension quality cannot be assessed through automated crawling
